title: bupleurum bicaule var. latifolium
intro: Bupleurum bicaule var. latifolium, also known as Broad-leaved Bupleurum, is a plant species within the Bupleurum genus, characterized by its broad, lance-shaped leaves and small yellow flowers. Traditionally, Bupleurum bicaule var. latifolium has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and supporting liver function. Bupleurum bicaule var. latifolium is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine and other herbal remedies.
